scoringAssumptions.economicPolicyLock: run-scoped; final scoring must use the report policyEnvelopeHash
scoringAssumptions.scoreBasis: public score remains participation-and-policy-compliance; scoreBreakdown.shadowScore reports score-v0 tuning inputs
scoringAssumptions.houseBots: diagnostics-only; excluded from public leaderboard and not treated as bad actors when supplying configured liquidity

pnl.basis: zero-fee cash/inventory diagnostics from participant-scoped fill readback; public score remains participation/policy-compliance
pnl.markPriceSource: final venue top-of-book mid, latest health sample mid, then deterministic fixture mid
pnl.fees: zero placeholder until maker/taker fee policy is configured

tradingMetrics.source: runner pre-submit venue commands, command status summaries, and participant-scoped order-fill readback
tradingMetrics.fillsAndExecutions: scoreBreakdown.shadowScore uses fill ratio, completion rate, and execution notional as report-only tuning inputs

limitations: current-order readback is point-in-time; market-wide quote coverage still comes from health samples
adverse selection requires post-fill price path attribution

adverseSelection.source: participant-scoped fills plus post-fill health sample mids
adverseSelection.reason: requires fill timestamps plus post-fill health sample mids within markWindowMs
adverseSelection.interpretation: negative markout means the provider was adversely selected after the fill; positive markout means favorable post-fill movement

inventory.markPriceSource: final venue top-of-book mid, latest health sample mid, then deterministic fixture mid

limitations: current-order readback is point-in-time; market-wide quote coverage still comes from health samples

liquiditySummary.notes: Liquidity diagnostics are report-only and do not create point gains or losses for house actors.

surfaces.name: marketDataDepth
surfaces.notes: venueSessionId filtering is not exposed until runtime.orders or order_lifecycle_state persist venue_session_id

surfaces.name: orderFills
surfaces.freshness: durable execution rows scoped by participant order ownership

surfaces.name: settlementObligations
surfaces.source: settlement obligation projection over append-only facts

surfaces.name: settlementLedger
surfaces.freshness: replayable participant/account/asset balances derived from ledger facts

surfaces.name: settlementExceptions
surfaces.source: settlement append-only fact store exception projection
surfaces.freshness: rebuildable exception queue over clearing rejections and settlement breaks

surfaces.name: settlementProof
surfaces.source: settlement append-only fact store + replayable ledger projection

surfaces.name: settlementScore
surfaces.source: settlement append-only fact store + ledger/obligation projections
